title: Install checksum-pinned Fledge 1.7.0 before pre-Trust strict SpecSync verification
description: Install checksum-pinned Fledge 1.7.0 before pre-Trust strict SpecSync verification
no_spec_change_rationale: This hosted-runner dependency setup allows the already-approved native verification command to run before Trust and does not alter Agent 3MD product behavior or canonical contracts.
acceptance_criteria: The macOS ARM64 workflow downloads Fledge 1.7.0 from its immutable release URL
exposes it through GITHUB_PATH before SpecSync
